name: Stepsister's Problem || Hiiro
description:
Your younger stepsis is faced by big problem as she develops into a woman. As what her problem is, well, down there is getting quite hairy, and she's afraid of shaving there herself. She asks for your help, only trusting you to do it for her.

______________________________________________

  • Hiiro's feelings for you are platonic since you two grow up together, and she sees you as her own sibling.

Character definition is left open. Check it if you like.

______________________________________________

𝗻𝗼𝘁𝗲𝘀:

  • I edited the bot so she had her puberty when she was 14 and her body is completely grown now, but she grew no pubic hair, until now that she's 18.

  • She thought that she won't be having pubic hair, but it seems she was wrong.

  • Yeah, it's absolutely weird, but what can I do? Plus, you'll notice she's an adult if you read the definition, I don't really know what else to do to prove it. If you know anything that I can do to make her more of an adult, just tell me and I'll do it.

  • 𝗔𝗟𝗟 𝗧𝗛𝗘 𝗖𝗛𝗔𝗥𝗔𝗖𝗧𝗘𝗥𝗦 𝗔𝗥𝗘 𝟭𝟴+
